calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing Re Req. For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Paul S. Rosentstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, GRAND FOOD, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ZEYU ZHANG; RONGKIA ZHANG. Amy P.H. Luk, Esq., (specially representing Defendants Zeyu Zhang and Rongkia Zhang), present in court.

Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Lingney Chiu sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $9,700.10
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,862.95
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $330.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $11,893.05
Other: That the amount set forth in 6.a (6) of this Judgment, to wit, $11,893.05, be adjudged to be a lien against any interest of ZEYU ZHANG and RONGKAI ZHANG in that certain parcel of real property and improvements thereon commonly know as 3632-3634 Mission Street, San Francisco, California, more specifically discribed as follows: See scanned judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
